requirement_topic.en: South African Regulatory Framework for Batteries — NRCS Compulsory Specifications scope and e-waste EPR (no EU-style battery regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: 南非电池监管框架——NRCS强制规范范围与电子废物EPR（无欧盟式电池法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 南非電池監管框架——NRCS強制規範範圍與電子廢物EPR（無歐盟式電池法規）

summary.en: South Africa has no single, EU-style battery regulation equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. Instead, obligations come from a layered framework: (1) NRCS Compulsory Specifications (VCs) — where a lithium battery or its host product (for example certain electrical and electronic appliances) is covered by a VC, an NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) is mandatory before the product is imported or sold; the NRCS operates under the National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act 5 of 2008. (2) SANS standards — South Africa adopts many IEC standards as SANS, referenced in VCs or used as the basis for testing. (3) E-waste Extended Producer Responsibility — under the National Environmental Management: Waste Act 59 of 2008 and the EPR Regulations published in 2020 (effective from 2021), producers, importers and brand owners of electrical and electronic equipment (which includes batteries and battery-containing products) must register with a Producer Responsibility Organisation (PRO) and finance end-of-life collection and recycling. There is no South African battery passport, mandatory carbon footprint declaration, or critical-mineral supply chain due diligence law for battery exporters.
summary.zh: 南非没有等同于法规（EU）2023/1542的单一欧盟式电池法规。相关义务来自分层框架：（1）NRCS强制规范（VC）——当锂电池或其载体产品（例如某些电气电子器具）被VC覆盖时，须在进口或销售前取得NRCS许可证（LOA），强制性；NRCS依据2008年第5号《国家强制规范监管机构法》运作。（2）SANS标准——南非将众多IEC标准采用为SANS，在VC中引用或作为测试依据。（3）电子废物生产者延伸责任——依据2008年第59号《国家环境管理：废物法》及2020年公布、2021年生效的EPR条例，电气电子设备（含电池及含电池产品）的生产者、进口商和品牌所有者，须向生产者责任组织（PRO）注册，并为报废收集和回收提供资金。南非没有针对电池出口商的电池护照、强制碳足迹声明或关键矿产供应链尽职调查法律。
summary.zht: 南非沒有等同於法規（EU）2023/1542的單一歐盟式電池法規。相關義務來自分層框架：（1）NRCS強制規範（VC）——當鋰電池或其載體產品（例如某些電氣電子器具）被VC覆蓋時，須在進口或銷售前取得NRCS許可證（LOA），強制性；NRCS依據2008年第5號《國家強制規範監管機構法》運作。（2）SANS標準——南非將眾多IEC標準採用為SANS，在VC中引用或作為測試依據。（3）電子廢物生產者延伸責任——依據2008年第59號《國家環境管理：廢物法》及2020年公佈、2021年生效的EPR條例，電氣電子設備（含電池及含電池產品）的生產者、進口商和品牌所有者，須向生產者責任組織（PRO）登記，並為報廢收集和回收提供資金。南非沒有針對電池出口商的電池護照、強制碳足跡聲明或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查法律。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act 5 of 2008 (NRCS Act) — administers Compulsory Specifications and Letters of Authority
National Environmental Management: Waste Act 59 of 2008
Extended Producer Responsibility Regulations (GN R.1184, 2020) — electrical and electronic equipment sector EPR

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent single battery regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), customs import/export declaration, and for certain rechargeable battery products mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA/SAMR catalogue. China's domestic EPR for waste batteries flows from the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) and the 2021 battery recycling measures, but applies domestically and differs structurally from South Africa's PRO-based EPR. There is no CN equivalent of an NRCS Letter of Authority; the closest mandatory CN gatekeeping mechanism is CCC where applicable.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应的单一电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，部分可充电电池产品还须依据CNCA/SAMR目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国废旧电池的国内EPR来自《固体废物污染环境防治法》（2020年修订）及2021年电池回收措施，但属国内适用，结构上与南非基于PRO的EPR不同。中国没有等同于NRCS许可证（LOA）的制度；最接近的中国强制把关机制是适用时的CCC认证。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應的單一電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，部分可充電電池產品還須依據CNCA/SAMR目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國廢舊電池的國內EPR來自《固體廢物污染環境防治法》（2020年修訂）及2021年電池回收措施，但屬國內適用，結構上與南非基於PRO的EPR不同。中國沒有等同於NRCS許可證（LOA）的制度；最接近的中國強制把關機制是適用時的CCC認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic EPR framework
CCC certification under CNCA/SAMR catalogue (where applicable)

gap.en: South Africa's framework imposes obligations with no direct Chinese equivalent: (1) an NRCS Letter of Authority where a Compulsory Specification applies, which requires a South African importer or representative and SANS-referenced test evidence; (2) e-waste EPR registration with a Producer Responsibility Organisation and payment of EPR fees for electrical and electronic equipment that includes batteries; (3) reliance on SANS adoptions of IEC standards rather than GB standards. Chinese exporters must identify whether their specific product or its host appliance falls under an active VC, appoint an in-country importer, and budget for EPR participation. These are administrative and documentation gaps beyond pure laboratory safety testing.
gap.zh: 南非框架施加了中国无直接对应的义务：（1）适用强制规范时须取得NRCS许可证（LOA），需南非进口商或代表及SANS引用的测试证据；（2）含电池的电气电子设备须向生产者责任组织注册电子废物EPR并缴纳EPR费用；（3）依赖IEC标准的SANS采用版而非GB标准。中国出口商须确认其具体产品或其载体器具是否属于现行VC范围，指定境内进口商，并为参与EPR预留预算。这些属于超出纯实验室安全测试范畴的行政及文件差距。
gap.zht: 南非框架施加了中國無直接對應的義務：（1）適用強制規範時須取得NRCS許可證（LOA），需南非進口商或代表及SANS引用的測試證據；（2）含電池的電氣電子設備須向生產者責任組織登記電子廢物EPR並繳納EPR費用；（3）依賴IEC標準的SANS採用版而非GB標準。中國出口商須確認其具體產品或其載體器具是否屬於現行VC範圍，指定境內進口商，並為參與EPR預留預算。這些屬於超出純實驗室安全測試範疇的行政及文件差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — an NRCS Letter of Authority is mandatory for products under an active Compulsory Specification; e-waste EPR registration is mandatory for producers and importers of electrical and electronic equipment under the Waste Act EPR Regulations. There is no single mandatory EU-style battery regulation
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance, customs declaration, and CCC where catalogued are domestic export gatekeeping requirements; no NRCS LOA, South African EPR, or battery passport applies under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, South Africa has no single battery regulation; the compliance picture is a layered one driven by NRCS Compulsory Specifications (which trigger a Letter of Authority where applicable), SANS adoptions of IEC standards, and e-waste EPR under the National Environmental Management: Waste Act. Chinese exporters should first confirm whether their product or its host appliance is covered by an active VC, secure a South African importer of record, prepare SANS-referenced test evidence, and register for e-waste EPR. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification does not by itself satisfy any of these South African obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，南非没有单一电池法规；其合规格局是由NRCS强制规范（适用时触发许可证LOA）、IEC标准的SANS采用版及《国家环境管理：废物法》下的电子废物EPR共同驱动的分层框架。中国出口商应首先确认其产品或其载体器具是否被现行VC覆盖，落实南非记录进口商，准备SANS引用的测试证据，并注册电子废物EPR。中国GB 31241或CCC认证本身均不能满足上述任一南非义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，南非沒有單一電池法規；其合規格局是由NRCS強制規範（適用時觸發許可證LOA）、IEC標準的SANS採用版及《國家環境管理：廢物法》下的電子廢物EPR共同驅動的分層框架。中國出口商應首先確認其產品或其載體器具是否被現行VC覆蓋，落實南非記錄進口商，準備SANS引用的測試證據，並登記電子廢物EPR。中國GB 31241或CCC認證本身均不能滿足上述任一南非義務。

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa
